title: PrimalFauna
body:
This mod expands and enhances the minecraft fauna by replacing some vanilla animals and adding new species, this will include farm animals and wild species.

most of the animals added by this mod have simplified genetic varieties, which includes variety in personality, colors, sizes and etc

most wild animals have wild behaviors, like fighting back when getting attacked, or running away from players, this makes it harder to get animals, but also makes tamed and domestic animals more valuable.
